extName.description: Extension name (visible in store and browser).

extDescription.message: Reduces distraction by hiding Reels and algorithmic content suggestions on Instagram's web interface. Collects no data.
extDescription.description: Short description of the extension (store listing).

popupSubtitle.message: Your preferences are stored only on your device.

toggleFeedReelPosts.message: Hide Reel posts in main feed

toggleRedirectProfileReels.message: Redirect profile Reels URLs back to profile
